sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP, data_field TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Sample Item', NOW(), 'Sample Data');
SELECT id, sprintf('Name: %s, Created At: %T', name, created_at) AS formatted_output FROM test_table WHERE bif:crc64(name) = bif:crc64('Sample Item');
SELECT id, name, sprintf('Data Length: %d', LENGTH(data_field)) FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(data_field) > 0;
SELECT id, sprintf('Has Content: %s', CASE WHEN data_field IS NULL THEN 'False' ELSE 'True' END) FROM test_table WHERE data_field IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, sprintf('%d%% complete', ROUND(100 * COUNT(*) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table))) AS progress FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, sprintf('CRC64: %s', bif:crc64(name)) FROM test_table WHERE bif:crc64(name) IN (SELECT bif:crc64(name) FROM test_table WHERE created_at < NOW());
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, NULL, NOW(), '');
SELECT id, sprintf('%S', name) AS escaped_name FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, sprintf('Temp Item: %s', name) AS temp_name FROM test_table WHERE id < 2 ORDER BY created_at DESC;
SELECT t.id, t.name, sprintf('ID: %d; Data CRC: %s', t.id, bif:crc64(t.data_field)) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table) AS t WHERE bif:crc64(t.data_field) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT sprintf('Entry %s', CONCAT(name, ' - ', bif:crc64(id))) AS entry_info FROM test_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ENTRY_INFO;
SELECT id, sprintf('Percentage NULLs: %.2f%%', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE data_field IS NULL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) ) FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, sprintf('Testing: %R', data_field) FROM test_table WHERE id >= (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table) OR id <= (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table);
CREATE TABLE join_test (join_id INT, test_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT j.join_id, t.name, sprintf('Join CRC: %s', bif:crc64(t.data_field)) FROM join_test j JOIN test_table t ON j.test_id = t.id WHERE bif:crc64(t.name) LIKE bif:crc64('%Item%');
